## Logical ID 別設定

### Web Socket Connect Route

Logical ID: `WebSocketConnectRoute`

用途推定: Web Socket Connect Route (AWS::ApiGatewayV2::Route)

| 設定項目 | 値 |
| --- | --- |
| `ApiId` | {"Ref":"WebSocketApi"} |
| `AuthorizationType` | CUSTOM |
| `AuthorizerId` | {"Ref":"WebSocketConnectAuthorizer"} |
| `RouteKey` | $connect |
| `Target` | {"Fn::Join":["",["integrations/",{"Ref":"WebSocketLifecycleIntegration"}]]} |
